cards.title: Orbital Debris
cards.description: Dave's lunch from 1998 is still up there. And it's angry.
cards.art_prompt: Colorful cartoon illustration of a chaotic cloud of silly space junk orbiting Earth, including a rubber duck, an old TV set, a toilet seat, and a pizza box all tumbling weightlessly, Earth glowing blue below, whimsical fun art style, bright saturated colors, detailed cartoon, Pixar style lighting

cards.title: Rogue Satellite
cards.description: It gained sentience. Its first act was to unsubscribe from NASA's emails.
cards.art_prompt: Colorful cartoon illustration of a grumpy looking old satellite with a cracked solar panel used as a middle finger, angry cartoon eyes on the satellite body, sparks flying, purple nebula background with stars, whimsical fun art style, bright saturated colors, detailed cartoon, Pixar style

cards.title: Solar Flare Shield
cards.description: SPF 9 billion. Still not enough for Karen's vacation.
cards.art_prompt: Colorful cartoon illustration of a tiny spacecraft hiding behind a comically oversized beach umbrella in space while a massive angry cartoon sun blasts a solar flare at it, the sun has a furious cartoon face, whimsical fun art style, bright saturated colors, detailed cartoon, Pixar style lighting

cards.title: Space Mechanic
cards.description: She can fix anything. Except her marriage.
cards.art_prompt: Colorful cartoon illustration of a tough-looking female astronaut mechanic floating in space with a huge wrench and duct tape, grease smudges on her helmet visor, surrounded by floating bolts and spare parts, giving a confident wink, whimsical fun art style, bright saturated colors, detailed cartoon, Pixar style
